name: Brucellosis (Contagious Abortion)
description: Bacterial infection (Brucella abortus) causing reproductive failure. Major zoonosis – can infect humans. Reportable disease in most countries.

diagnostic_criteria.definitive: Rose Bengal Test, Brucella milk ring test, culture

treatment_info.veterinary_treatment: No treatment – test and slaughter policy in most countries. Vaccination program (RB51 or S19 vaccine) for prevention.
supportive_care: Safe disposal of aborted foetus and placenta
treatment_info.first_aid: ZOONOSIS RISK – wear gloves and PPE when handling aborted material. Report to animal health authorities.
treatment_info.do_not: Do not allow aborted material to contaminate feed or water. Do not handle without PPE.
